summary: Subscription Health Dashboard testing completed. All 15 features tested and passed. Backend API returns correct JSON structure with all required fields (active_subscribers, mrr, churn_30d, failed_payments_7d, retry_queue, upcoming_renewals_7d, recent_events). Frontend Sub Health tab renders correctly with 6 metric cards, events table with proper columns, and refresh functionality. Dark theme with purple accents implemented. Mobile responsive design working.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/subscription-health?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 returns 200 with correct JSON structure

Response includes: active_subscribers (number=1), mrr (number=$29), churn_30d (number=6), failed_payments_7d (number=6), retry_queue (number=0), upcoming_renewals_7d (number=0), recent_events (array with 20 items)
Each recent_event has type, user_email, timestamp fields
recent_events are sorted newest first (by timestamp descending)
Endpoint requires admin_key (returns 422 without it)
Endpoint rejects invalid admin_key (returns 403)
Response is cached for 30 seconds (second call returns identical data)
No sensitive Stripe keys returned in response
Admin Panel: 'Sub Health' tab exists (data-testid='tab-sub-health')
Sub Health dashboard renders (data-testid='sub-health-dashboard')
6 metric cards render (data-testid='sub-health-cards' contains sub-health-card-0 through sub-health-card-5)
Each card shows a metric value (data-testid='sub-health-value-0' through 'sub-health-value-5')
Recent events table renders (data-testid='sub-health-events-table')
Events table has columns: Event Type, User Email, Date
Refresh button works (data-testid='sub-health-refresh')
All existing admin tabs still work (overview, users, subscriptions, logs, features, tools, security, waitlist)
Dark theme implemented (card background: rgb(10, 10, 10))
Purple accents implemented (MRR value color: rgb(123, 97, 255))
Event types color-coded (green for success, red for failures, amber for warnings)
Mobile responsive design working (2-column grid on mobile)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing stripe_webhook_events (67 events) and users collection (1 active subscriber: demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription Health Dashboard is fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/admin/subscription-health returns cached data (30 seconds). Current metrics: 1 active subscriber, $29 MRR, 6 churn events in 30d, 6 failed payments in 7d, 0 retry queue, 0 upcoming renewals. Frontend Sub Health tab is the last tab in admin panel. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.

returns.upcoming_renewals_7d: number (active users with subscription_end within 7 days)

sub_health_tab.location: Last tab in admin panel tabs

design.animations: subtle card number transitions with framer-motion
